reviews.title: It is really terrible..
reviews.text:
We smelled bad when we enter the room,but we thought it would be better.
However it had been got worse.
My wife waken up 02:00 and told her bed smelled stink like sonebody peed on bed before.
We went to reception to change bed or room.  
But she cannot speak English and finally house keepers came to the room and took the bed.
But... no change of bed or room.. just asked us to wait till 07:00 or 08:00.

This is the worst hotel that I ever experienced and it just spoiled whole of  my family trip that wpupd be the last during my stay in Vietnam.

reviews.title: Tạm được
reviews.text: Resort phòng hơi cũ, máy lạnh gây ồn, vòi cầm tay phòng tắm khớp nối bị hư không gắng vô tắm được. Đặt biệt chán là cửa ra ban công không khóa được, chỉ gài cái tay cầm, mà phòng tôi lại liền với phòng khác, nên để đồ trong phòng không yên tâm, dù có 1 cái két sắt nhỏ trong phòng. Tường phòng đóng mấy cái bột gì vàng vàng mà không lau quét cho sạch. Tôi định chuyển phòng khác xem sao nhưng lúc vô phòng nghỉ chắc phòng OK nên bỏ Vali quần áo ra các thứ, với có con nhỏ. Chuyển qua lại cũng phiền, Nghỉ là ở 1 đêm chắc cũng được nên thôi. Bể bơi thì cũng được nhưng với tôi thì hơi nhỏ, vì là resort chứ không phải là Hotel nên tôi nghĩ là nhỏ. Thấy ít có người trông coi Lá cây rụng xuống hồ bơi không thấy người dọn, thấy có anh bảo vệ lâu lâu đi ngang nhặt vài ba lá. Chắc họ dọn mỗi ngày vào buổi sáng nên trưa chiều có lá trong hồ nhiều. Đồ ăn Buffet sáng thì cũng được. Thích nhất ở đây là cảnh biển tự nhiên, các mỏm đá chụp hình đẹp nước trong, ai không sợ sóng mạnh thì xuống mấy chỗ cát trống tắm, cát dưới nước mịn, dễ chịu, tắm xong lên phơi nắng rất thoải mái. Chỉ có cái là rác trong mấy khe đá hơi nhiều không có người dọn thường xuyên nên nhìn hơi mất thẩm mỹ.

reviews.title: A motel or reststop on the way
reviews.text: It's a bit of a stretch to call this a resort, it's more like a motel or a reststop on the way. There is a really nice garden, a small private beach, but the room and the overall offer are not up to my standard of how a resort or hotel should offer. Also, if you are assigned a room on higher than the ground floor, beware that there's no elevator so pack carefully.

Cửa phòng mình bị hư, nhân viên kỹ thuật lên sửa xong đóng cửa cái rầm rồi đi, k thông báo với KH là xong hay chưa và nói 1 câu nào cả.
Gọi lễ tân thì cứ hỏi số phòng trong khi gọi từ máy bàn thì lễ tân phải hiển thị số phòng nào chứ, đưa 1 bạn nào trẻ măng ko có kinh nghiệm trực, hỏi gì cũng k biết.
Biển nhiều vỏ sò, cát ko mịn nên tắm không thích.
Khu vực này ăn uống cũng k nhiều sự lựa chọn.
Để mà lựa chọn cho 1 khoảng thời gia hơn 3 tiếng lái xe thì mình recommend nên đi Vũng Tàu/Hồ Tràm/ Phan Thiết hoặc đạp luôn Cam Ranh vẵn hơn là ghé ở đây nhé. Cũ kĩ lắm rồi

reviews.title: A less enjoyable experience
reviews.text: The resort and accommodations were relatively clean, and the staff in general were quite friendly and enthusiastic. However, I had a not-so-pleasant experience. We booked 3 garden view rooms and paid in advance. Due to a foreign guest wanting to change to a room with a direct sea view during check-in, when I communicated this request, the reception said I would have to pay an additional 1.8 million for the room upgrade. Since I was in a position where I couldn't refuse the foreign guest, I had to accept. After getting the room, I had time to check Agoda again and found that the price for a newly booked sea view room at that moment was only 800K more than the garden view room I had booked, while the reception was charging me 1.8 million extra, which was almost equal to the booking price for a new room with a direct sea view. It was clear that they were taking advantage of customers wanting to upgrade their rooms. If I hadn't been in a difficult situation at check-in, I would have just booked a new direct sea view room through Agoda and let go of the room I had booked to avoid this frustration. I had a not-so-pleasant experience, so I promised myself that I wouldn’t return to stay at Hòn Cò, nor recommend it to friends and relatives for their vacations.

reviews.title: Recent Stay at Premium Garden View Room (Room for Improvement)
reviews.text:
My mom and I recently stayed for 3 nights in a Premium Garden View Room. The beachfront location was beautiful, with a clear and inviting beach right in front of the restaurant. The staff was incredibly friendly and helpful throughout our stay.

However, there were two areas for improvement. Firstly, the sea view around the bungalows was unfortunately marred by a significant amount of plastic trash. We would love to see the resort take steps to clean this up and preserve the natural beauty of the area.

Secondly, the room had an interconnecting door, which resulted in very poor sound insulation.  Unfortunately, on our first night, the couple in the next room were quite noisy, and the sounds easily traveled through the door. This significantly disrupted our sleep, and despite calling reception at midnight, we were informed that the issue couldn't be resolved until the morning. Needless to say, this led to a restless night.

Overall, we enjoyed the friendly staff and beautiful location, but the noise issue and plastic pollution detracted from our experience. We believe that by addressing these areas, the resort could significantly improve the guest experience.

reviews.title: 1 night in Cà Ná
reviews.text: At Cà Ná, the Hon Co resort is the largest and also has the most beautiful scenery. The resort has some nice check-in spots, and during the season without seaweed, the sea is clear and beautiful. However, I find the private beach of the resort not too spacious and impressive, and the restaurant prices are quite expensive (the same goes for the surrounding restaurants). The rooms are basic but also a bit outdated. The restaurant staff is very enthusiastic. I will consider coming back when the sea is more beautiful, but I also hope the resort will renovate to look newer.

Trên đường đi Cam ranh, vị trí ngay bờ biển rất đẹp, độc đáo với những tảng đá tròn lô nhô ở bờ cát và xen lẫn vào khu vườn sát biển, buổi chiều mát trèo lên mỏm đá rộng ngắm hoàng hôn tuyệt đẹp.

Khu vườn rộng nhiều cây xanh và cây cổ thụ to cao rất mát mẻ. Mùa nắng hoa giấy nở rất đẹp. Nên trồng thêm nhiều bụi hoa hơn nữa cho thêm phần rực rỡ.

Resort ở vị trí rất thú vị, sẽ quay lại.
reviews.negatives:
Hành lang và nhất là ngay sảnh trước thang máy luôn luôn thấy để các thùng khăn, xe dọn vệ sinh, ở khắp nơi, cứ để đó cả ngày đến tối nhìn không được hay lắm.
Tình trạng này ở các khách sạn, resort lớn không có, chỉ có xe dọn vệ sinh ở các phòng, xong là đi, rất gọn gàng.

Resort được xây lâu rồi, theo kiểu cũ, hình khối bên ngoài vẫn đẹp, nhưng nội thất bên trong phòng không được bắt mắt, nhất là phòng vệ sinh, dù resort vẫn giữ cho phòng khá sạch sẽ. Nếu được cải tạo thêm phần nội thất sẽ rất thu hút khách.

reviews.title: Beautiful landscape
reviews.text:
The hotel is located in a beautiful area with many high rock beaches and clear water. The reception staff is charming, and the breakfast buffet is diverse. However, there are two points at this hotel that need improvement: 
- I stayed in a bungalow where the bathroom door was hard to close, the sink was loosely attached, and the bed was quite creaky. Just stretching my legs slightly made the bed creak. 
- Food: the dishes were sweet. The seafood at the restaurant was fresh, but they added sugar, which made it feel very rich. 
The room rate and food prices are higher compared to Nha Trang. There were many mosquitoes in the room, and although the hotel provided a mosquito racket, I still got bitten while sleeping.

The resort is clean and grounds are well kept. The natural rock formations are a beautiful back drop of the resort. 
Rooms, the one we had, was small and we had to get housekeeping to spray for ants. Room took several hrs to air out after the spraying. The beach area is beautiful with natural rock coves and course sand beach. Area was clean but the water had too much floating plastic and other garbage in it. Restaurant located with the resort had a good dinner selection of seafood, but the service was poor and price was too high. All in all this resort is OK, for a short stay.

reviews.title: Pristine and tranquil
reviews.text:
The location is secluded from residential areas, with coastlines and National Highway 1A nearby. Convenient for transportation. 
- The area is not close to residential zones, making it quite peaceful, with no waste. The beach is pristine with numerous rocky patches. 
- The beach is not very smooth, especially with many natural creatures, corals, and various types of crabs. 
- The sea water is clear in its natural color. 
- The rooms have just been renovated and are quite new. The resort is isolated with a restaurant (welcoming guests for dining in the day). 
- The pool and greenery of the resort are well cared for. There is a scenic walkway along the beach. 
- The breakfast buffet offers just enough basic dishes, with local specialties cooked on the spot: banh xeo, banh can, pho... 
- There is a spacious parking lot and a charging station for electric vehicles.

reviews.title: A stopover when returning from Nha Trang. A lovely hotel right by Ca Na beach.
reviews.text: Cà Ná Beach at the end of May has some waves, but it's clean and lovely. The hotel has a fairly large swimming pool. The breakfast buffet also offers many options, including a stand for Central Vietnamese pancakes and pancakes. The crispy pancakes are very delicious, and if the pancakes are a little crispier and served with shredded mango, they would taste even better. The peanut dipping sauce is good but a bit salty and spicy. The chili should be served separately for those who can’t handle spicy food. The staff is polite and friendly, but sadly, the surrounding garden decor is in a Japanese style, which doesn’t match the coastal theme and uses too many plastic materials for decoration, making it not environmentally friendly. The management should take note.

Then in the morning, despite being unable to access our room for the entire previous evening until 10pm, they wanted to charge us for 2 bottles of water on top!! There were no signs or price lists or any indication they were chargeable items. So we refused and left.

reviews.title: Beautiful Resort
reviews.text:
Pros:
Well appointed rooms.
Idyllic resort layout and gardens nestled amongst large boulders. 
Sheltered little coves for swimming.
Ground staff and cleaning staff super friendly.
Cons:
Poor breakfast selection. Pretty well depleted by 7am and not replenished.
The restaurant is in such an idyllic location but they have inappropriate music cranked way to loud.
Most of the restraunt staff looked like the didn't want to be there.

reviews.title: Ok for a stop over if was on a long journey.
reviews.positives:
Ok hotel for one night stop over. 
Kind of basic. The location was right next to the motorway but you couldn’t hear it. It just felt like it was out on a limb. Beach was ok and it had a big pool. Good enough to break up a long journey for one night.

reviews.title: Almost perfect resort
reviews.text: Our room (sea view bungalow) were spacious and beautiful, with luxurious equipment and direct view to the sea. The landscape is beautiful and house settings is great it feels like a friendly neighborhood. A little bit far from the city, but right on the highway. The beach is OK, and great for fishing. Imagine this: in the afternoon, I could fish on a rock while my wife and kids played on the sand 5 meters away, and in the evening I could fish right from the backdoor of the bungalow. Staff are very friendly. However, there are so many little things, although tolerable for us during our time, that stop this resort from being a perfect one: the breakfast is too poor, the room cleaner is too unprofessional they carried buckets and cloth from room to room, and the worst thing is the Hai Au restaurant, the first dinner they forgot our main dish, and didn't start to make it until we almost finished our meal and go ask them for, the second meal was worse, it took exactly 1 hour 22 minutes for the dish to arrive.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Views, beach, Pool, breakfast.
reviews.negatives: English profession of employee. Left cleaning equiment on the room. Should be a 4 star resort instead of 5 star.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Một khu nghỉ dưỡng tuyệt vời. Resort có khung cảnh đẹp, biển trong xanh, bờ cát trắng, sóng vừa phải cùng với hồ bơi lớn. Cơ sở vật chất trong tình trạng tốt. Khu vực sân vườn, cảnh quan được chăm sóc kỹ lưỡng mang đến nhiều góc chụp hình lý tưởng. Bufet sáng tương đối đa dạng. Nhìn chung resort mang lại khoảng thời gian nghỉ dưỡng tuyệt vời.

reviews.title: My wife and I had a great stay and enjoyed every minute.
reviews.positives: The location was very good for access to the main highway. The seafront location was amazing and very clean and safe.

reviews.title: Resort agreement
reviews.text: The resort is located along the national highway, so buses can easily pick up and drop off right in front of the resort. It is clean and spacious, cool due to the many trees in the area. There is a very spacious private beach behind the resort, convenient for guests who want to swim in the sea or in the pool. Breakfast is served buffet style with many choices and is delicious. However, there are not many options for lunch/dinner at the restaurant. But there are two other large restaurants near the resort, which you can walk to in 5 minutes for more dining experiences. The resort is quite far from the center (30 km) or Vinh Hy (90 km), so it is very suitable for a relaxing stay. If you want to visit other attractions, it is advisable to have a personal vehicle; there is plenty of parking space here. And since the resort does not offer motorbike rentals, when I wanted to go to Vinh Hy, I had to rent a personal motorbike from a staff member here at a quite high price (500k/day).

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives:
Everything except the shower. 
Great view
reviews.negatives: Bathtub+shower 🛁 is not ideal for 6ft Australian.

reviews.title: Ok, sẽ quay lại
reviews.text: Nếu nói về cơ sở vật chất thì resort này k coa gì để khen, mọi thứ ở mức chấp nhận dc, nhưng đáng giá chính là thiên nhiên ở đây, biển xanh trong vắt, bãi cát sạch sẽ, không khí trong lành, ở đất liền ngay quốc lộ mà tưởng ở ngoài đảo. Staff thân thiện, buffet đa dạng món, 2 ngày cuối tuần nên ghé 👍

reviews.title: Excellent

reviews.title: Overnight on motorcycle trip
reviews.text: Great hotel in an amazing location. Facilities are first rate. Super hot water and a huge bathtub were a bonus after a long day on the road. Fascinating scenery where the ocean meets the giant boulders of the mountains. Restaurant by the sea. Be careful, the portions we got were huge. A nice bit of luxury while on a long ride! We will be back.

reviews.title: Position beautiful but you pay for it
reviews.positives: Good sized room comfortable and clean. Restaurant served good food although the choices were limited by the fact it was not buffet and they had run out of many things. Pool a good size but no one available to give out towels .
reviews.negatives: Room faced the road so it was very noisy. Pool itself needed a bit of cleaning, lots of sand and pine needles, but it was exceptionally windy. Our balcony was very dirty. Expensive

Giá đồ ăn hơi cao nhưng mà phần ăn tương xứng với giá tiền, biển đẹp nếu gió nhẹ.

reviews.title: Resort for tourists looking to relax.
reviews.text:
I have been here for 3 days and 2 nights. The check-in process was quick, and the staff were enthusiastic. The room I received was nice and clean, with a sea view, but it was a bit close to the fishing area, so it was just okay.  
This place is mainly for relaxation, but it's a bit boring since all you can do is swim, there's a pool, and there's one restaurant (it's good for drinking but a bit expensive for eating). There are no locals around this area, and it's far from the city, so getting around is difficult. If you want to go somewhere else to have fun, you'll have to rent a vehicle.  
In my opinion, this place is fine for families wanting to relax, while for groups looking to have fun, there's space to eat and drink...  
Having experience now, next time I come back, I will prepare the itinerary more thoroughly.  
8/10*

Breakfast buffet has many delicious options. 
Room prices are worth it compared to the amenities and services. 
However, the location is quite far from the center and Vinh Hy. So, it's suitable for relaxation, staying around here. If you have a car, it's not a problem, you can drive to Vinh Hy and to the center, because the resort does not have motorbike rental services. That day, I had to ask to rent a personal motorbike from an employee, and the price was quite high (500k per day). 
The lunch/dinner options at the restaurant are not very varied, however, there are 2 other large restaurants nearby where guests can choose to have more experiences.

reviews.title: Family resort
reviews.text: The landscape on the campus is cool and clean. The staff continuously cleans the area. The sea is calm and very clear. There are plenty of fish and snails for the kids to experience. One suggestion for the resort is that there is a steep and slippery slope from the room area to the restaurant. It is very dangerous for elderly people. It would be better to design a stair lane or anti-slip edges for adults and children to walk more safely. I will come back.

reviews.title: The heron.
reviews.text: The accommodation is clean, comfortable, and the staff is enthusiastic and friendly. However, the room needs to be equipped with a dressing table and a tissue box to be more complete. The space is quiet, spacious, and the beach is very beautiful.

reviews.title: Hòn Cò Cà Ná Resort - ideal for families
reviews.text: The resort is beautiful with many green trees, spacious, and attractive grounds. The staff is very friendly and enthusiastic. The breakfast is quite okay and diverse. The amenities lack some items and the toothbrush holder is rather weak. It would be better to install a shelf in the bathroom for body wash and shampoo to keep them separate from the sink and add hooks for hanging clean clothes. What the hotel already has is great. Improving a little with a shelf in the bathroom would be fantastic. Thank you to the resort staff. I will come back if I have the opportunity.

reviews.title: worth staying for relaxation
reviews.text: My family stayed one night at this hotel, which is clean and worth the money. The beach location is beautiful and my kids really enjoyed it. The area is spacious with cool greenery, and the rooms are clean. The beach isn’t very long but it is clean and beautiful. The kids got to swim in the sea and the pool, and they loved exploring the coral reef. The breakfast had a bit few options, but I think it was okay for the price range. It's definitely worth experiencing a stay in this Cà Ná coastal area.

reviews.title: Suitable for relaxation.
reviews.text:
I stayed for one night for my trip, unfortunately it was the day of the storm so I couldn't take many beautiful photos, but everything else was worth the money I spent.

The biggest disappointment was definitely breakfast, too few dishes and not many options. There are only 2 restaurants on the premises, but they weren't to my liking. Therefore, at noon, I went to eat rice at a nearby place and also had a delicious beef hot pot just 1km from the resort.

The staff deserves a perfect score. 

My room was in the Premium category, so the view was nice. However, there is no elevator to get to the third floor.

reviews.title: I love everything about Hon Co Ca Na- will definitely return soon
reviews.text: As said, everything in this resort is perfect. Though they are still doing some construction and a little bit noisy but Im fine with that. Breakfast is limited but you cant expect more with the value you pay. The staff are nice, smiling, helpful and friendly. The room itself must be 4* or more. the only disappointment: they have no pool and the kids definitely do not like it. They dare not to swim in the ocean because too much rocks, living coral (and looks really crazy- I always have goose bumps when thinking about that), and rubbish too- not too much but still uncomfortable feeling for a tiny beach like that. But for relaxation, I definitely recommend this!

reviews.text: The room is okay, the amenities are good, the price is 775k/night, including breakfast which is also good. I'm quite satisfied. The only issue is that there are a bit of ants, not red ants. The area is too large, walking to the beach is exhausting :D The food prices at Hai Au restaurant are a bit high but delicious. You get what you pay for. The beach is very beautiful but deep; just taking two steps in and you're off the ground, which is a bit disappointing. It would be better if the beach were shallower. The pool is very clean as well. My child loves it. This area is a bit quiet; it costs 80k to get into the city of Phan Rang due to the toll fee :v

reviews.title: Worth experiencing
reviews.text:
The sea is calm, clean, and beautiful. But depending on the season, there may be a lot of seaweed, just seaweed, which does not affect the aesthetics; it’s just that when swimming or snorkeling, it’s advisable to wear soft beach shoes to protect your feet since there are many rocks with small clams and oysters attached. Carelessness can lead to cuts on your feet. The accommodation area is also very nice, clean, and reasonably priced. The food at the restaurant is delicious, slightly overpriced, but fresh. The breakfast buffet is diverse and tasty. 

The inconvenience is that there are no dining or entertainment options around the area except for nearby resorts. If you go towards Ca Na port, there is a supermarket and bubble tea....

Note: The resort area does not rent motorcycles, so those who do not have their own transportation should pay attention to this point.

Tại resort có nhà hàng phục vụ hải sản tươi sống cũng ổn áp, nêm nếm vừa vị. 
Phòng mình book cho 4 người, rộng rãi, đầy đủ tiện nghi, sạch sẽ. Rất ok luôn! 
Nhưng chỉ phù hợp với những ai có nhu cầu đúng kiểu nghỉ dưỡng, chỉ muốn chill trong resort thôi á, vì ở đây xung quanh không có chỗ chơi khác và tại resort cũng chỉ có biển, view đẹp, hồ bơi to thui nhoa, không có các hoạt động giải trí khác.

reviews.text:

+ Friendly staff, good service, early check-in support
+ Beautiful clean beach, clear water, white sand, silver stones, peaceful scenic views
+ Decent breakfast within the price range.
+ The Beach Front Villa has a jacuzzi, great sea view, and a very chill sunrise view 

- The swimming pool has no heating, the water is quite cold in the afternoon.
- The surrounding area has few dining options; you can eat at the Hai Au restaurant or drive to the nearby Ca Na market area where there are many eateries.

reviews.title: Will come back.

We arrived early around 9:00 AM intending to drop off our luggage at the resort, but the resort accommodated us with an early check-in. The staff is charming and friendly. The room is clean. The beach is beautiful, suitable for families wanting to relax.

reviews.title: Hon Co Resort is an excellent place for relaxation.
reviews.text: The resort is very spacious and beautiful. The sea view is really impressive. I'm not a reviewer, I'm a real experience guest; I hardly ever give reviews, but today I have to come and praise this place because I am captivated by everything from A to Z at the resort. The staff are enthusiastic and attentive. The free breakfast buffet included with the room booking is delicious and offers many dishes, and it's clean. The resort is very spacious and has many beautiful rooms, probably hundreds of them; there are plenty of green trees in the resort, the beach is very clean and beautiful, always lush and green, there’s also a beautiful swimming pool, and a swing view for guests to take photos, plus there are beautiful rocky areas as well. Especially, the prices are reasonable compared to the quality of service I received. It’s absolutely wonderful; if I have the chance, I would love to come back to this place 🥰.

reviews.title: Peaceful resort.
reviews.text: The resort has a beautiful beach and a landscape with plenty of greenery. The pool is large and clean. The quiet space is suitable for relaxation because there are no busy areas nearby! The inside of the room is kept clean, however, the outside is not very clean. Parking is conveniently right next to the room. The breakfast is not too varied but suitable. I will return next time.

reviews.title: Magnifique Plage , rochers , piscine
reviews.text:
Grand Resort avec très beau parc arboré autour des bâtiments . Ce Resort est entouré d’une très belle plage avec de beaux rochers et un excellent panorama . Très belle piscine vue mer , plage , rochers . 
Chambre à 23€ entrée de gamme  avec balcon vue montagne : lit très confortable mais le mobilier et la décoration de la chambre sont 2 étoiles . Pas un bruit . 
Très bon petit  déjeuner vietnamien sous forme de buffet dans le restaurant donnant sur la plage . 
il est important d’être motorisé car l’entrée du Resort est en bordure d’autoroute loin de tout . 
Le Resort est d’un autre temps mais il est  en très bon état général . 
Ne vous attendez pas à du luxe 2025 mais à un site qui a du cachet par son parc , sa plage , ses rochers et la mer et non par les bâtiments .

reviews.title: Mittelmaß
reviews.text:
Wir hatten einen Garten Bungalow gebucht und haben ein verschimmeltes Erdgeschoss Zimmer im Haupthaus bekommen, zum Glück war der Safe kaputt, nachdem 4 Männer geschickt wurden für die Reparatur haben und wir darauf hin ein neues Zimmer reklamiert hatten haben wir dann auch endlich das gebuchte Zimmer bekommen, allerdings nach sehr viel Diskussion und nach einem Telefonat mit dem Manager. 
Die Portionen im Restaurant sind sehr groß und auf alle Fälle ihren Preis wert. 
Finger weg vom Haupthaus, Hauptstraße dahinter

reviews.title: Mehr Schein als Sein
reviews.text:
Schade, da haben wir uns mehr versprochen. 
Der Highway liegt direkt am Hotel und ist sehr laut. Zumal auch der Zug hier noch vorbeikommt (geht, liegt hinter dem Highway).
Wir bekamen ein Zimmer mit Meerblick (Extrakosten), welches direkt am Nachbargrundstück grenzte (Shrimp-Farm mit Pumpengeräuschen) obwohl das Haus fast leer war und sicherlich andere Räume zur Verfügung gestanden hätten.
Die Ausstattung ist leider nur Holzimitat und spiegelt den Anspruch nicht wieder. Das Gleiche im Restaurant. Wir bekamen das Zimmer zu einem Angebotspreis, welcher den Aufenthalt gut wiederspiegelt. Den Normalpreis finde ich hier vollkommen überzogen.
Alles in Allem aber sauber und in die Jahre gekommen.

Het ressort kan wel een update gebruiken. Een beetje achterstallig onderhoud moet worden gedaan. Ontbijt is heerlijk, ligging super. Wat wel vreemd is in het restaurant, je moet voor 4 personen bestellen, ook al ben je met zijn tweeën. Das vreemd….
Verder moet je niet vermelden dat je faciliteiten hebt die er niet zijn.. ik zou dat aanpassen. Verder is het prima te doen hier!

reviews.text:
周囲に本当に何もなく、レストランは徒歩で移動できる距離に1つあるが、高速で走るバスやトラックが走っている国道を歩かなければならないのが怖い。
ただ、静かな滞在ができて海も静かで泳ぎやすい。スタッフはいつも笑顔で優しい。

reviews.title: 次回はゆっくり
reviews.text: 何と言っても海がキレイ。部屋も清潔でバルコニー付き、食事も満足。リゾート全体のレイアウトもいいので、次回はゆっくり滞在したい。

reviews.title: コスパ最高！
reviews.text: サービスは洗練されていないが、施設や掃除は行き届いている。海の透明度も高く、波も高くないので海で泳ぎやすい。プールの水は温かすぎるくらいだが、泳ぎやすい。周辺に何もない分、ホテル内でのんびり過ごせた。

reviews.title: 문제가꽤나있네요
reviews.text:
일단 판장시내에서 30분 거리 떨어져있고
아고다에서 3만7천원 텍스포함가격으로 예약후
방문하였으나. 카드결재안되니 다음날아침현금결제 요구하더라구요. 가격도 5만원으로 올랐습니다

사실 이곳은 조식. 룸....직원서비스 전부 엉망이구요. 
다만 해변가 뷰 자체만 최고입니다

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.text:
2일전에도 같은호텔에서 잠잘때 에어콘이 약해서 잠을 설처서 피곤했다
어제도 같은호텔을 이용 했는데 다른방인데
에어콘이 처음엔 좀나오다
나중엔 더우ㅏ서 잠을 잘수가 없었다
직원에게 말을 했는데 미안하다는 말도 없고 당연하다고 .....무신경한 직원이다 다시는 이호텔은 이용안한다....

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.text:
아침식사도 엉망
방에 에어콘도 엉망 
특히 직원태도가 너무엉망이다

reviews.title: 판랑에서 판티엣 방향으로 50분거리
reviews.text: 아고다의 위치정보가 잘못되어 판랑시티에서 오토바이로 50분 정도 소요되는 거리에 위치해 있습니다. 위치정보외 이용은 만족했으나, 판랑과 거리가 멀어 밖에 나가기 힘들어서 리조트에만 머물렀네요... 리조트내 해산물식당에 한글메뉴도 있고 수영장이 좋았습니다.

reviews.title: 쉬는 곳으로는 좋은 곳으로 추천합니다.
reviews.text: 바닷가면서 바위가 곳돗에 많아서  호젓하고 이색적인 분위기인데 쉬러 오시는 분에게는 좋은 곳입니다. 시내와는 거리가 있기 때문에 이점을 감안하여 이용하면 되겠습니다.

reviews.title: 불편함3개를 한방에  날려버린 바다전경
reviews.text:
전 무조건 다시 투숙합니다^^이번엔 하루만 머물렀지만 다음엔 3일을 머물러도 아깝지않습니다
호텔숙소내부시설 오래됨이 확 옵니다 샤워배수 안됩니다, 내부도 다른곳에 비해 좁습니다
하지만 호텔과 바로 연결된 정원처럼 바다가 있습니다 발리만큼의 깨끗한바다가 호텔 정원처럼., 호텔 식당바로앞에 있습니다
정원도 오랜세월만큼 잘 풍성하게 다듬어져있고.  실외수영장에서 바다를보며 즐길수 있습니다
물론 판랑 시가지에서 거리가있어 택시비용은 추가금이 있었지만 너무나 잘한 선택였어요

reviews.title: Very beautiful place
reviews.text:
I like Hon Co resort and I love Ca Na.
Very clean and peaceful place.
I will trip again and again.

reviews.title: 幽静的好去处
reviews.text: 酒店环境很好，位置较偏。交通不便。客房玻璃门建议增加窗帘，不然影响休息。

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.text: sẽ tuyệt cho gia đình, nghỉ dưỡng sau 1 kì làm việc, đồ ăn ngon, buffet sáng hơi đơn giản dù là dịp lễ nhưng ngon hợp khẩu vị

reviews.title: Dở tệ
reviews.text: Xa trung tâm, ít phương tiện di chuyển, nhân viên không thân thiện, nhà hàng ăn không take care khách hàng, không chuẩn bị những vật dụng cần thiết ( bàn chải đánh răng)

reviews.title: lần đầu trải nghiệm tệ ở nơi được gọi là resort
reviews.text: 1 trải nghiệm không được tốt, cửa phòng đóng mạnh mới được, mỗi lần đóng là nghe ầm ầm nguyên khu vực, máy hút mùi tolet kêu như máy cày ồn ko thể ngủ được được, phân biệt hạng đặt phòng, chưa kể ở cùng khu khách đoàn vô ý thức nhậu nhẹt la hét ồn ào cả đêm, phải gọi bảo vệ nhờ hổ trợ, sáng sớm đóng cửa ầm ầm khỏi ngủ luôn, đi nghỉ dưỡng mà như đi tra tấn

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.text: vật chất cũ, nv không chuyên nghiệp

reviews.title: Phòng resort nuôi muỗi
reviews.text: Mình chưa bao giờ ở 1 cái resort nào mà nó tệ đến mức này. Phòng trên tầng 2 thì cũng đầy muỗi mình có nói với nhân viên thì cũng chie bảo thời tiết nồm ẩm nên có muỗi và không có hướng giải quyết nào nên đổi sang 1 phòng khác. Dưới tầng 1 thì oh my god nó còn kinh khủng hơn, phòng mới này là cả 1 ổ muỗi con mình bị đốt chi chít phòng tắm thì khai lòm mình đã may mắn có đem theo ga trải giường du lịch dùng 1 lần chứ không thì chắc tôi không dám ngủ trên giường đó luôn.  Nằm ngay trên đường cao tốc nên ồn lắm nha nên hên là chỉ ở lại 1 đêm

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.text: Phòng nhỏ không decor nhiều. Gần resort ko có gì chơi không có taxi, cũng không chỗ thuê xe máy. Khung viên resort đẹp và biển sạch. Máy lạnh phòng thì kêu to cách âm kém, tivi remote máy lạnh không dùng được

reviews.text: tạm ổn

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.text: Phòng ẩm thấp, cái bugalow còn có mùi, máy lạnh giữa đêm thì hư, nv thì thái độ. Dc cái view đẹp thôi.
